skill.name: kpi-dashboard-design
skill.description: Design KPI dashboards with metric selection, layout patterns, visualization guidance, and example calculations for business monitoring.
skill.summary: Create focused KPI dashboards for executive, department, SaaS, and operations reporting.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: Static analysis reported command execution, credential access, weak crypto, reconnaissance, and network indicators. Manual review found these are Markdown examples, dashboard terminology, SQL identifiers, and benign reference links, with no prompt injection or malicious intent found.

low_findings.title: Markdown Backticks Misidentified as Shell Execution
low_findings.description: FALSE_POSITIVE: The reported external command locations are Markdown inline code or fenced examples for KPI concepts, dashboard mockups, SQL, and Streamlit code. No shell command execution instruction or user-input execution path was found.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The reviewed locations are documentation formatting and illustrative code blocks. There is no instruction to run shell commands or execute untrusted input.

low_findings.title: Reference Links Are Benign Documentation URLs
low_findings.description: FALSE_POSITIVE: The hardcoded URLs are static resource links in a Resources section. They do not perform network requests, send data, or instruct the model to exfiltrate information.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The URLs appear only as Markdown references. No runtime network code or credential-bearing request is present.

low_findings.title: Security Keyword Matches Are Contextual False Positives
low_findings.description: FALSE_POSITIVE: The Windows SAM, weak crypto, and reconnaissance detections map to ordinary text such as the skill name, dashboard wording, a system health panel, and SQL identifiers. No credential database access, cryptographic code, or host reconnaissance was found.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Manual context confirms these are semantic keyword collisions. The file contains no sensitive file paths, crypto implementation, or reconnaissance commands.

low_findings.title: Critical Combination Heuristic Dismissed
low_findings.description: FALSE_POSITIVE: The dangerous combination of code execution, network access, and credential access is not semantically present. The matched evidence consists of Markdown examples, resource links, and dashboard labels.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Each component of the heuristic was reviewed in context and found to be benign. No malicious workflow or prompt injection text was found.

content.user_title: Design KPI Dashboards That Drive Decisions
content.value_statement: Teams often build dashboards that show too many metrics and miss business context. This skill guides KPI selection, layout, visualization, and monitoring patterns.
actual_capabilities: Select KPIs for sales, marketing, product, finance, SaaS, and operations dashboards.
Design dashboard hierarchies for executive summaries, department views, and detailed drilldowns.
Choose layout patterns for summary dashboards, SaaS metrics, and real-time operations views.
Create example SQL calculations for MRR, retention, and customer acquisition cost.
Draft Streamlit dashboard structures using pandas and Plotly examples.
Apply best practices for context, alerts, drilldowns, color, and responsive design.
limitations: It does not connect to live databases or business intelligence platforms.
It does not validate metric formulas against a real company data model.
It provides design guidance and examples, not a complete production dashboard.
It assumes users can supply goals, audiences, and available data sources.

use_cases.title: Plan an Executive Scorecard
use_cases.description: Define a concise dashboard with headline KPIs, trends, targets, and alert areas for leadership review.

use_cases.title: Improve Department Reporting
use_cases.description: Choose department metrics and organize views for sales, marketing, product, finance, or operations teams.

use_cases.title: Prototype a SaaS Metrics Dashboard
use_cases.description: Map MRR, ARR, retention, churn, CAC, LTV, and payback period into a clear dashboard structure.

prompt_templates.title: Choose Basic KPIs
prompt_templates.prompt: Help me choose 5 to 7 KPIs for a dashboard about [business area]. The audience is [audience]. The main goal is [goal].

prompt_templates.title: Design a Dashboard Layout
prompt_templates.prompt: Design a KPI dashboard layout for [team]. Include summary cards, charts, alerts, filters, and drilldown sections.

prompt_templates.title: Review an Existing Dashboard
prompt_templates.prompt: Review this dashboard plan: [paste description]. Identify weak metrics, missing context, layout issues, and better visualization choices.

prompt_templates.title: Define Metric Governance
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a KPI governance plan for [organization]. Include metric definitions, owners, update frequency, targets, thresholds, and quality checks.

output_examples.input: Design an executive dashboard for a SaaS company.
output: A one-page layout with MRR, ARR, churn, NPS, and active customers as headline KPIs.
Trend charts for revenue growth and retention.
Alert areas for churn threshold breaches and support volume changes.

output_examples.input: Improve a marketing dashboard with too many metrics.
output: A smaller KPI set focused on acquisition cost, qualified leads, conversion rate, and campaign ROI.
Grouped sections for acquisition, engagement, and return on investment.
Recommendations to remove vanity metrics without clear decisions.

output_examples.input: Create a real-time operations dashboard concept.
output: A live status view with service health, throughput, error rate, latency, and recent alerts.
Threshold-based color states for degraded services.
A drilldown path from service status to incident details.

best_practices: Start with the audience, decision, and action before choosing metrics.
Limit each main view to the KPIs that change decisions.
Show targets, trends, comparisons, owners, and update frequency for every KPI.
anti_patterns: Do not mix strategic, tactical, and operational metrics without clear hierarchy.
Do not use 3D charts or decorative visuals that distort comparisons.
Do not publish KPI values without definitions, formulas, and data freshness notes.

faq.question: Can this skill build a complete dashboard application?
faq.answer: It provides design patterns and example implementation guidance. It does not deliver a full production application by itself.

faq.question: Which dashboard audiences does it support?
faq.answer: It supports executives, managers, analysts, and operations teams through strategic, tactical, and operational dashboard patterns.

faq.question: Does it include metric examples?
faq.answer: Yes. It lists KPI examples for sales, marketing, product, finance, SaaS, and real-time operations.

faq.question: Can it help choose chart types?
faq.answer: Yes. It guides layout and visualization choices for trends, distributions, retention, alerts, and summary metrics.

faq.question: Does it require a specific BI tool?
faq.answer: No. The guidance is tool-agnostic, with optional Streamlit and Plotly examples for prototyping.

faq.question: How should I prepare before using it?
faq.answer: Prepare the audience, business goals, metric definitions, data sources, update frequency, and known decision points.
